name: COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE v. STANDARD LIFE & ACCIDENT INSURANCE CO.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE v. STANDARD LIFE & ACCIDENT INSURANCE CO. (433 U.S. 148, 1976 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
